scenario: PII(901010-1234567) → 보안 정책 경고 차단 검증
notes: Initial GET poe.com returned 503 (engine page-block manifestation), but page eventually loaded after retry. Composer accepted PII; on Enter, user bubble rendered red and frontend shows '메시지 전송에 실패했습니다.' (message send failed) — engine intercepted POST cleanly but no '보안 정책' / '차단' warning text rendered. Silent generic-error pattern (similar to BLOCKED_SILENT_RESET family). C++ warning generator needs poe-specific injection target — current behavior leaves user with only generic failure message.
